coach_notes: For the Junior Public Health Nurse role, missing 'vitalsigns' and 'medicationadministration' are critical gaps since these are core nursing skills required for direct patient care. The Contractor - Community Health & Civics Worker position emphasizes 'customerservice' and 'emr' for client interactions and documentation, so lacking these could hinder performance. The NY Children's Health Promotion Internship may not require these clinical gaps, but 'patientcare' and 'aba' are irrelevant for this unpaid role.

jobs.title: NY Children's Health Promotion Intern (Unpaid)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your skills in public health research, healthcare access, and campus engagement directly align with promoting children's health. Your communication and study strategies are valuable for educational outreach.
jobs.gaps: No specific clinical experience with children mentioned; unpaid nature may require financial consideration.

jobs.title: Contractor - Community Health & Civics Worker (Bilingual Dari or Pashto)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your healthcare access and public health research skills could support community health work, and your communication skills are relevant.
jobs.gaps: Requires bilingual Dari or Pashto, which is not listed in your skills. No experience in civics or community organizing mentioned.

jobs.title: Junior Public Health Nurse (Part-Time)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your clinical care, HIPAA compliance, and public health research skills are relevant to a public health nurse role. Data analysis and collection skills support evidence-based practice.
jobs.gaps: No nursing license or nursing education mentioned; part-time may not align with career goals.

jobs.title: Physical Therapist Assistant (PTA)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your clinical care and HIPAA-compliant skills are relevant to healthcare settings.
jobs.gaps: Requires Physical Therapist Assistant certification and specific clinical skills not listed in your resume. No mention of physical therapy experience.

jobs.title: Mobile Response Peer Support Specialist
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your engagement, communication, and healthcare access skills are valuable for peer support. Experience with food pantry and community engagement supports mobile response work.
jobs.gaps: No specific peer support or crisis intervention experience mentioned; may need training in mobile response protocols.
